temporal_description:
A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man with short, dark hair and glasses. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt. The background is completely dark, with a cool, greenish-blue light illuminating him from the front. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. At the bottom of the frame, white Chinese characters appear, which translate to "Very good-looking." The camera remains static, holding the tight shot on the man's face. The audio opens with a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score that creates a feeling of unease and anticipation. The sound of hurried footsteps on a hard surface can be heard, suggesting a sense of urgency and movement.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of three men walking forward in a dimly lit, dark environment. The man in the center, who is the focus, wears a light-colored jacket with a floral-patterned scarf around his neck. To his left, a man in a red jacket and a patterned bandana looks down. To the right, another man in a dark shirt walks alongside them. The background is dark and out of focus, with some blurry lights suggesting an urban night setting. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. White Chinese characters appear at the bottom of the screen, translating to "Be careful, if something goes wrong, go first." The camera follows the men as they walk. A man speaks in a low, urgent, and cautionary tone, his voice filled with concern as he warns, "小心，出事先走" (Be careful, if something goes wrong, go first). His delivery is quick and serious, emphasizing the gravity of the situation. The tense music continues to play in the background, heightening the feeling of danger and suspense.
